UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIXTON CP CHINATOWN, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALFRED'S LLC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: STREET AND LOWER LEVEL OF THE BUILDING LOCATED AT 662 CLAY STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA 94111 AND THE BUILDING LOCATED AT 659 MERCHANT STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA 94111 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100075036)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIXTON CP CHINATOWN, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ALFRED'S LLC DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
